__fixture__.name: upgrade_order_violation
__fixture__.scenario: Launcher-and-local-sidecars boundary starts with a mixed coordinated artifact set: the launcher was updated to a newer build identity while an older helper from the prior coordinated set is still on disk. The boundary is coordinated_artifact_set_only, so any mixed startup is refused rather than warned. Outcome is 'refused_upgrade_order_violation' with fail_closed_state.posture = 'fail_closed' and a rollback repair hint. This is the worked example cited by the acceptance criterion covering 'how a boundary fails closed when the upgrade order is violated'.

dropped_capabilities.reason_note: Indexer sidecar is from the prior coordinated artifact set (indexer.2026.02) while the launcher was promoted to launcher.2026.04. Mixed startup is outside the coordinated_artifact_set_only window.
Launcher contract@2 requires a coordinated diagnostic sidecar build that is not present on disk.
Launcher contract@2 requires a coordinated search sidecar build that is not present on disk.

negotiation.reason: Mixed launcher/helper startup is refused. The launcher was promoted ahead of the coordinated artifact set; individual helpers cannot follow on their own on this boundary. Rollback restores the prior coordinated set.

skew_window.window_summary: Launcher and helper binaries come from one coordinated artifact set with shared build identity, contract version, and schema epoch.

upgrade_order.violation_note: Launcher was promoted to contract@2 while an indexer helper from contract@1 remained on disk; coordinated_artifact_set_only boundaries cannot continue under a mixed set.

downgrade_behavior.state_preservation_note: Local-only workspace state is preserved across rollback; mid-flight helper sessions are refused rather than migrated.
downgrade_behavior.note: Downgrade is a coordinated rollback; individual helpers cannot downgrade while the launcher stays forward.

fail_closed_state.visible_reason: Aureline detected a mixed launcher and helper set. The launcher was updated but at least one helper binary is from the prior coordinated artifact set. This boundary does not run mixed sets; roll back to the prior coordinated artifact set, or finish promoting the full set before launching.

unsupported_state_behavior.contract_rule: Refuse mixed launcher/helper startup with a visible reason; offer rollback to the prior coordinated artifact set.

repair_hints.instruction: Roll back to the prior coordinated launcher-and-helpers artifact set. The prior set continues to run all protected paths while you retry the promotion.
If rollback does not resolve the mixed set, contact admin or support with this envelope id so the release evidence can be inspected.

notes: Illustrative seed envelope only; this is not a live release packet. This fixture is the worked example cited by the upgrade-order acceptance criterion.
